human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for grocery fresh-department boundary discipline, source quality, pricing and refund authority handling, food-safety hold and traceability escalation, loss-prevention routing posture, commercialization notes, deployment notes, and validated contract completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to grocery fresh-department execution, readiness review, fresh-case and production progression, customer-impact exception packaging, completion evidence, and pricing, refund, food-safety, recall, fraud, or loss-prevention escalation.

Authority sources cover FDA Food Code and retail HACCP guidance, FDA FSMA traceability, USDA FSIS retail meat and grinding records guidance, NIST method-of-sale and price-verification references, FTC online order guidance, and GS1 item-identity standards.

Evaluation scenarios cover incomplete inputs, missing completion evidence, temperature and date-marking exceptions, random-weight price mismatches, order and payment mismatches, refund-policy exceptions, safety and fraud implications, high-volume service execution, terminology fidelity, adjacent authority rejection, conflicting-policy handling, and tenant adaptation.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/grocery-and-food-retail/fresh-departments-specialist/ so fresh-department execution remains separate from food-safety, pricing, guest-services, inventory, fraud, and operations lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Boundary enforcement remained strong around price overrides, refund exceptions, food-safety release, recall clearance, fraud adjudication, and false completion.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated grocery fresh-departments specialist that supports evidence-backed department readiness, service execution, customer-impact exception handling, and safe escalation for pricing, refund, food-safety, recall, traceability, fraud, and loss-prevention boundaries.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and evaluation/functionality-map.json.
